CreateDbCluster.description: Grants permission to create a new Timestream InfluxDB Cluster

CreateDbInstance.description: Grants permission to create a new Timestream InfluxDB instance

CreateDbParameterGroup.description: Grants permission to create a new Timestream InfluxDB parameter group

DeleteDbCluster.description: Grants permission to delete a Timestream InfluxDB Cluster

DeleteDbInstance.description: Grants permission to delete a Timestream InfluxDB instance

GetDbCluster.description: Grants permission to get information about a Timestream InfluxDB Cluster

GetDbInstance.description: Grants permission to get information about a Timestream InfluxDB instance

GetDbParameterGroup.description: Grants permission to get information about a Timestream InfluxDB parameter group

ListDbClusters.description: Grants permission to list information about all Timestream InfluxDB clusters in the account

ListDbInstances.description: Grants permission to list information about all Timestream InfluxDB instances in the account

ListDbInstancesForCluster.description: Grants permission to list information about all Timestream InfluxDB Instances belonging to a cluster

ListDbParameterGroups.description: Grants permission to list information about all Timestream InfluxDB parameter groups

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a Timestream InfluxDB resource

RebootDbCluster.description: Grants permission to reboot a Timestream InfluxDB Cluster

RebootDbInstance.description: Grants permission to reboot a Timestream InfluxDB instance

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a Timestream InfluxDB resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag a Timestream InfluxDB resource

UpdateDbCluster.description: Grants permission to update a Timestream InfluxDB Cluster

UpdateDbInstance.description: Grants permission to update a Timestream InfluxDB instance

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by a tag key and value pair that is allowed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by a tag key and value pair of a resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by a list of tag keys that are allowed in the request
